stories.title: Johnson & Johnson completes clinical study for OTTAVA robotic surgical system
stories.summary: Johnson & Johnson said it has demonstrated the feasibility of OTTAVA's compact design for small operating rooms. The post Johnson & Johnson completes clinical study for OTTAVA robotic surgical system appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: SensorStream iOS App - Use your iPhone as a sensor platform
stories.summary: Want to stream your iPhone’s sensors to ROS 2? (Yes, you can even get point clouds!) I made an app to do exactly this, available for download on the App Store! stories.title: Where does latency in WebRTC video streaming come from? An analysis
stories.summary: We analyzed the glass-to-glass latency of streaming video from robots to the web using WebRTC. Typical, total latency for remote streaming is 150-180 ms but how does this break down? Tl;dr: The vast majority of latency actually comes from the camera itself and the USB bus ( ~100 ms ). H264 encoding
